title: 2PCS Silicone Air Fryer Liners, Reusable Rectangular Air Fryer Accessories, Non-Stick & Dishwasher Safe, for Dual Basket Air Fryers Including AF200EU, AF300EU, AF400EU
features: 【Premium Materials】The air fryer silicone liners are made of premium silicone material, making them soft, flexible, foldable, easy to store, and resistant to deformation. They are reusable, reducing waste and being very environmentally friendly.

【Practical Design】The handles on both sides of the silicone mat prevent burns and provide a comfortable grip. The textured and grooved bottom design not only promotes airflow and even heating but also helps remove excess grease from food, keeping it fresh.
【Easy to Clean】The premium silicone material is smooth, non-stick, and oil-resistant, preventing food from sticking. Simply flip and rinse to easily remove food residue. It is also dishwasher safe.

【Safe and Heat Resistant】The air fryer silicone liners are made of premium materials with excellent heat resistance. It can withstand temperatures up to 260°C without deforming, cracking or melting, ensuring long-term safe use.

【Versatile Use】The air fryer silicone liners are compatible with the AF300EU, AF200EU, and most other dual-zone air fryers. They can also be used for heating, grilling, and dehydrating food. Perfect for air fryers, ovens, microwaves, and steamers.
description: Features: - Made of premium silicone, it is foldable, resistant to deformation, and reusable. - Handles on both sides prevent burns and make it easy to handle. The textured and grooved bottom design promotes airflow and even heating. - The silicone material is smooth, non-stick, and oil-resistant, making it easy to clean. - Can withstand temperatures up to 260°C without deforming, cracking, or melting. - Compatible with AF200EU、AF300EU, and most other dual-zone air fryers. Perfect for use in air fryers, ovens, microwaves, and steamers. Specifications: Product Color: Black Product Material: Silicone Max Operating Temperature: 260℃ Product Size: Before Folding: 19.5*12.5*6.5 cm / 7.68*4.92*2.56 inch Compatible Air Fryer Models: AF200EU、AF300EU、AF400EU、AF400EUCP、COSORI8.5L、Keplin 9L、EMtronics 9L、 Cuisinart 10.4L Packing List: 2*Silicone Air Fryer Liners Note: 1.There may be some size errors within 0-1 cm due to manual measurement. 2.There may be some color differences due to different equipments.
